{"settings":"{  
    
  "explorer.confirmDelete": false,
  "editor.fontFamily": "'Source Code Pro'",
  "editor.fontSize": 16,
  "git.confirmSync": false,
  "redhat.telemetry.enabled": true,
  "vs-kubernetes": {
    "disable-linters": ["resource-limits"],
    "vscode-kubernetes.helm-path.linux": "/home/felipe/.local/state/vs-kubernetes/tools/helm/linux-amd64/helm",
    "vscode-kubernetes.kubectl-path.linux": "/home/felipe/.local/state/vs-kubernetes/tools/kubectl/kubectl",
    "vscode-kubernetes.minikube-path.linux": "/home/felipe/.local/state/vs-kubernetes/tools/minikube/linux-amd64/minikube",
    "vs-kubernetes.minikube-show-information-expiration": "2024-04-20T23:07:11.926Z",
    "vscode-kubernetes.helm-path-linux": "/home/felipe/.local/state/vs-kubernetes/tools/helm/linux-amd64/helm",
    "vscode-kubernetes.minikube-path-linux": "/home/felipe/.local/state/vs-kubernetes/tools/minikube/linux-amd64/minikube"
  },
  "githubPullRequests.createOnPublishBranch": "never",
  "terminal.integrated.cursorStyle": "underline",
  "vscord.app.name": "Visual Studio Code",
  "editor.inlineSuggest.enabled": true,
  "workbench.startupEditor": "none",
  "explorer.confirmDragAndDrop": false,
  "tabnine.experimentalAutoImports": true,
  "git.openRepositoryInParentFolders": "never",
"security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
  "cSpell.userWords": ["foliboni"],
  "git.enableSmartCommit": true,
  "git.autofetch": true,
"editor.detectIndentation": false,
"editor.minimap.enabled": false,
"editor.smoothScrolling": true,
"editor.cursorSmoothCaretAnimation": "on",
"explorer.openEditors.visible": 0,
"workbench.statusBar.visible": false,
"breadcrumbs.enabled": false,
"editor.scrollbar.horizontal": "hidden",
"editor.scrollbar.vertical": "hidden",
"window.menuBarVisibility": "toggle",
"window.title": " ",
"window.confirmSaveUntitledWorkspace": false,
"window.titleBarStyle": "custom",
"workbench.colorTheme": "Dracula Theme",
"workbench.layoutControl.type": false,
// "editor.guides.indentation": false,
"editor.renderLineHighlight": "none",
"editor.glyphMargin": false,
"editor.showFoldingControls": "never",
}"}
